webservice.description: Lists all installed fun packs on the local Solace Browser service — each pack has id, locale, jokes_count, and facts_count

outputs.total: integer — total number of installed packs

guarantees: Always returns HTTP 200 when service is running
At least 13 packs installed (one per locale: en, es, vi, zh, pt, fr, ja, de, ar, hi, ko, id, ru)
default-en pack is always present (baseline English pack)
Each pack entry has id, locale, jokes_count, facts_count
Response time < 2s (filesystem scan, no LLM in path)

evidence_notes: Fun packs are the personality substrate for YinYang. Elisabeth Hendrickson: charter-based exploration of delight — if the API can't list what's installed, users can't discover or manage packs. 13-locale requirement enforces i18n completeness.
